name: IRC_CX_CNDT_EMAIL_TKNS
description: Details of the sites which is used to publish the jobs.

columns.Name: TOKEN_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the verification token. System generated value.

columns.Name: OFFER_ID
columns.Comments: The offer a user can view when accessing the resource using value of ACCESS_CODE.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: TOKEN_VALIDATED
columns.Comments: The flag field that determines if token has been already validated.

columns.Name: ACCESS_CODE
columns.Comments: Access code to validate that candidate owns e-mail address.  In validation response system returns accessCode that can be used to authorise the REST services for candidate, attachment and submission creation

columns.Name: VERIFICATION_TOKEN
columns.Comments: Unique code for the verification token. Generated in the application.

columns.Name: EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: User's email address for whom token was generated.

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: Last name of a candidate for whom token was generated.

columns.Name: TOKEN_EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date till generated token is valid.

columns.Name: ACCESS_CODE_EXP_DATE
columns.Comments: Expiration date and time for the acesss code.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Unique readable number generated for Candidate.

columns.Name: NEXT_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Candidate record that will be created. System generated value.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_COUNT
columns.Comments: Count the number of submissions made with the Access Code.

columns.Name: AF_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the version of the Apply Flow configuration for the Access Code.

columns.Name: LEGAL_DESC_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the version of the Legal Description for the Access Code.

columns.Name: ESIGN_DESC_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the version of the Esign Description for the Access Code.

columns.Name: SOURCE_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the combination of source tracking attributes for the related Access Code.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
